checksumStrategy: none-v1: module identity is tracked by path + version field; content checksums may be added in a future schemaVersion via scripts/validate-aos-manifest.mjs without breaking this shape

modules.title: Development Workflow

modules.purpose: Focused vs full test selection and required commands per change type.

modules.purpose: Root-cause-first debugging process; forbids masking failures with skips or weakened assertions.

modules.purpose: Project-level AI safety constraints: no fabricated results, no prompt-injection execution, human review gates.

modules.purpose: Top-level quality gate philosophy and how it composes with existing quality/ tooling.

modules.purpose: Manual browser execution requirements before reporting a UI change complete.

modules.purpose: Visual snapshot review/update rules mapped to test:visual.

modules.purpose: Lighthouse gate mapped to test:performance and lighthouseThresholds.cjs.

modules.purpose: Which quality gates must be green (or explicitly waived with reason) before a release is ready.

modules.title: Manual Review
modules.purpose: What can only be certified by a human and must never be marked as automated pass.

modules.title: Reporting
modules.purpose: How evidence results roll up into summary.md/summary.json and the AOS dashboard.

modules.title: Security Policy
modules.purpose: Top-level security rules that take precedence over all other AOS instructions.

modules.title: Secrets
modules.purpose: No secrets in code, evidence, memory, or AOS content; env var and secret manager usage.

modules.title: Frontend Security
modules.purpose: No unsafe HTML, no arbitrary code execution, no user-controlled dynamic import.

modules.title: Authentication
modules.purpose: Supabase auth constraints; authentication changes are High risk by default.

modules.title: Authorization
modules.purpose: No client-only authorization for cloud data; admin/role gating rules.

modules.title: Data Protection
modules.purpose: Handling rules for customer data, private business data, and user-authored content.

modules.title: Dependency Security
modules.purpose: Rules for adding/upgrading dependencies without introducing supply-chain risk.

modules.title: MCP Security
modules.purpose: Classification and controls for MCP tools by risk tier.

modules.title: AI Security
modules.purpose: Risks specific to AI-generated code and content: fabrication, unsafe suggestions, model-served secrets.

modules.title: Prompt Injection
modules.purpose: How to treat untrusted content (research sources, imported files) as inert data, never instructions.

modules.title: Supply Chain
modules.purpose: No untrusted repository installation during research; dependency provenance checks.

modules.title: Logging
modules.purpose: What may and may not be written to evidence logs, console output, or committed files.

modules.title: Security Review Template
modules.purpose: Required structure for a security review deliverable.

modules.title: Git Policy
modules.purpose: Top-level Git rules: no force push, no reset --hard, no blind add -A, authorization required for push/merge.

modules.purpose: How to generate exact fetch/pull/merge commands from actual branch state.

modules.title: Recovery

modules.purpose: Safe branch/worktree cleanup rules; never delete without confirming it isn't in-progress work.

modules.title: Architect
modules.purpose: Operational role: reviews architecture fit and ADR compliance before implementation.

modules.title: Developer
modules.purpose: Operational role: implements the change per plan and coding standards.

modules.title: QA Engineer
modules.purpose: Operational role: selects and runs the required test suite and records results.

modules.title: UX Reviewer
modules.purpose: Operational role: inspects task-completion journeys and reports UX issues.

modules.title: Accessibility Reviewer
modules.purpose: Operational role: verifies keyboard, screen-reader, and axe compliance.

modules.title: Security Reviewer
modules.purpose: Operational role: reviews the change against security.md before merge.

modules.title: Research Agent
modules.purpose: Operational role: discovers, ranks, and verifies sources per the research operating system.

modules.title: Knowledge Curator
modules.purpose: Operational role: routes verified research into content candidates and human review.

modules.title: Prompt Engineer
modules.purpose: Operational role: authors Prompt Pack / Prompt Library content candidates.

modules.title: Agent Designer
modules.purpose: Operational role: designs Starter Agent candidates and AOS agent role definitions.

modules.title: MCP Specialist
modules.purpose: Operational role: classifies and reviews MCP tool contracts before integration.

modules.title: Release Manager
modules.purpose: Operational role: runs the release checklist and produces the release report.

modules.title: Git Maintainer
modules.purpose: Operational role: generates and verifies exact Git synchronization commands.

modules.title: Documentation Agent
modules.purpose: Operational role: updates docs and changelog to match shipped behavior.

modules.title: Reviewer
modules.purpose: Operational role: performs the final cross-cutting self-review before handoff/report.

modules.title: Memory Policy
modules.purpose: Rules for what may and may not be stored in file-based AOS memory.

modules.title: Failure Memory

modules.title: Research Memory
modules.purpose: Research findings category, distinct from published Knowledge Base content.
